name: Revenge of the Damned
desc_clean: Wurmkin 1 The quiet of a cairn grinds away even the strongest of souls.
mechanic_summary: Revenge of the Damned to Spell klanu Wurmkin. Wurmkin 1 The quiet of a cairn grinds away even the strongest of souls. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Wurmkin 1 The quiet of a cairn grinds away even the strongest of souls. I'd thought this silence a testament to their unusual obedience, and, in a way, I was correct. Once I saw the pit of damned kinstones, I knew this clan was the same as all others — no stranger to disagreements or strict punishment. Once, long ago, I would've admired such Judgement. But what place do I have to think of that now.
